description_long: This object consists of a pair of over-ear headphones with a built-in microphone, resting on a modern, minimalist headphone stand. The stand features a vertical black rod with a spherical support at the top, mounted on a rectangular black base, all placed on a wooden platform. The headphones are predominantly white with black ear cups and a visible red accent on the inner side of the ear pads. A coiled audio cable extends from the headphones, draping over the edge of the wooden platform. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for use in a home office, gaming setup, or public tech kiosk. The materials and construction suggest durability and a focus on both aesthetics and utility.
description: A pair of white over-ear headphones with a microphone, displayed on a black stand atop a wooden platform, with a visible audio cable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headphones centered on the stand, with the cable extending forward over the wooden platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the headphone's ear cup design, the microphone boom, and the spherical support of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the cable and microphone more visible on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headphone's other ear cup, the cable, and the stand's structure.
